---
description: 'TypeScript code style and conventions for this project.'
applyTo: '**/*.ts, **/*.tsx'
---

# TypeScript Instructions

## Conventions

- Use explicit types for function signatures
- Prefer types over interfaces for object shapes
- Use async/await for asynchronous code
- Organize imports: external, then internal, then styles

## Patterns

- Use functional components in React
- Use hooks for state and side effects

## Anti-patterns

- Avoid using any
- Avoid non-null assertions (!)
